title: Which of the following statements is correct?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which of the following statements is correct?

Every LP problem has at least one optimal solution

If a feasible region is unbounded then LP problem has no solution

Branch and Bound method can be used to solve LP problem

If an LP problem has two optimal solutions, then it has infinitely many solutions.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Every LP problem has at least one optimal solution.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which financial statement's structure is closest to that of the basic accounting equation?

Income Statement

Statement Of Stockholders’ Equity

Balance Sheet

Retained Earnings

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Balance Sheet. 

The basic accounting equation is Assets = Liabilities + Equity. The structure of a balance sheet also follows this equation, with assets on one side, and liabilities and equity on the other.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
SWOT is a good method for finding the current situation analysis.
Select one:
True
False

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
True. 

SWOT (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats) analysis is a useful method for conducting a current situation analysis. It involves identifying and analyzing the organization's internal strengths and weaknesses as well as external opportunities and threats. This method helps organizations to develop strategies by leveraging their strengths against opportunities and mitigating weaknesses and threats.

turns.text:
